text: Upon entering this space, I am struck by the clarity and sterility of the architecture—the glass walls invite curiosity yet maintain boundaries. The atmosphere feels anticipatory, like a threshold before discovery. Passing through leads me to a vividly designed exhibit about research and development. The juxtaposition of text and images, the vibrant colors and purposeful arrangement, spark a sense of wonder in me. I feel both inquisitive and slightly disoriented by the angled perspectives, reflective of the mutable nature of knowledge itself. Here, I am compelled to ponder the evolving interplay between humanity and technology, and my mind is drawn to questions about my own place within this unfolding narrative.
